question: What are solar panels and how do they work
answer: Solar panels convert sunlight into electricity using photovoltaic cells. These cells generate direct current power which is then converted into usable alternating current by an inverter.

question: How long do solar panels usually last
answer: Solar panels are designed to last twenty five to thirty years or more. Most manufacturers provide long term performance warranties to guarantee efficiency over time.

question: Will solar panels work on cloudy days
answer: Yes solar panels still produce electricity on cloudy days though output is reduced. Modern systems are designed to work efficiently in a wide range of weather conditions.

question: How much electricity can a home solar system generate
answer: Electricity generation depends on system size roof orientation and sunlight levels. A typical home system can cover a significant portion of annual energy use.

question: Do solar panels require a lot of maintenance
answer: Solar panels require very little maintenance. Occasional cleaning and visual inspections are usually sufficient to keep the system operating efficiently.

question: How long does it take to install solar panels
answer: Most residential solar installations are completed within one to three days. Larger or more complex systems may take slightly longer.

question: What happens to solar energy at night
answer: At night solar panels do not produce electricity. Homes can draw power from the grid or from a battery storage system if installed.

question: Can solar panels reduce my electricity bills
answer: Yes solar panels can significantly reduce electricity bills by generating your own power. Savings depend on energy usage system size and local electricity rates.

question: Are solar panels suitable for all types of roofs
answer: Solar panels work best on roofs with good sun exposure and adequate structural strength. Our team assesses roof suitability before installation.

question: What is a solar inverter and why is it important
answer: A solar inverter converts DC electricity from panels into AC electricity for home use. It is a critical component that ensures safe and efficient operation.

question: Do I need battery storage with my solar system
answer: Battery storage is optional but useful for storing excess energy. It allows you to use solar power during evenings or power outages.

question: How does solar energy impact the environment
answer: Solar energy produces clean electricity without greenhouse gas emissions. It helps reduce reliance on fossil fuels and lowers carbon footprints.

question: What warranties are provided with solar panel systems
answer: Most systems include panel performance warranties and inverter warranties. Installation workmanship warranties are also typically provided.

question: Will installing solar panels increase my property value
answer: Many studies show that homes with solar panels can have higher property values. Buyers often appreciate lower energy costs and sustainability features.

question: How much does a typical solar installation cost
answer: Costs vary based on system size equipment type and installation complexity. We provide personalised quotes after an on site assessment.

question: Can my solar system be expanded in the future
answer: Yes many solar systems can be expanded if roof space and electrical capacity allow. Future expansion is easier when planned during initial design.

question: What happens during a power outage with solar panels
answer: Standard grid tied systems shut down during outages for safety reasons. Systems with battery backup can continue supplying power to selected loads.

question: Are there government incentives for installing solar panels
answer: Many regions offer incentives rebates or tax benefits for solar installations. Availability depends on local and national programs.

question: How do I monitor my solar energy production
answer: Most systems include monitoring software accessible via phone or computer. This allows you to track production usage and system performance.

question: Why should I choose your company for solar installation
answer: We offer experienced installers high quality equipment and transparent pricing. Customer support and long term reliability are core to our service.
